description: Your seismic monitoring network has been experiencing elevated false-alarm rates over the past week. The network operator suspects that one of the five GE-network stations (TOLI, GSI, KWP, SANI, BKB) is producing unreliable data that is contaminating the automatic event detection pipeline. Identify the anomalous station and disable its processing module bindings to remove it from the automatic detection pipeline. Document the identified station, observed symptoms, and corrective actions in an operator log at /home/ga/Desktop/station_anomaly_report.txt.
